summary: Tested new Admin Profile and Database Backup features. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All new sidebar Company section sub-items, Admin Profile page, and Database Backup page working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Admin Profile API correctly validates current password before allowing change
Email uniqueness check properly excludes current user
Database export includes all important collections with proper JSON formatting
Backup scheduler runs at IST timezone (9 AM and 5 PM)
WhatsApp and Email notifications working for triggered backups
Sidebar Company section auto-expands when navigating to sub-routes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Profile and Database Backup features fully tested. Sidebar Company section contains all 7 sub-items (Company Details, Users, Admin Profile, Email Logs, WhatsApp Logs, SMTP Settings, Database Backup). All adminOnly routes properly protected. Database backups are stored in backup_history collection with sent_whatsapp and sent_email flags.

password_change.wrong_current_password: PASS - Shows error toast 'Current password is incorrect'

database_backup_page.download_backup: PASS - Returns valid JSON with all collections
database_backup_page.backup_history: PASS - Shows recent backups with status badges

data_verification.backup_scheduler: Running in background at 9:00 AM and 5:00 PM IST
